observation: I can see the Specter.AI website with two prominent call-to-action buttons: 'Create Account' and 'Get Started'. There's also a sign-up form at the bottom with email and password fields already filled in. Since I'm testing the sign-up flow as a normal user, I should click the 'Create Account' button which is the most obvious registration entry point.
reasoning: As a normal first-time user, I would naturally click on 'Create Account' to begin the registration process. This is the most prominent sign-up option available and clearly indicates account creation functionality.

dual_diagnosis.visual_observation: The sign-up flow did not progress as expected. Instead of advancing to the next step or showing a form, a red loading circle/spinner appeared in the center of the screen, suggesting the action is stuck in a loading state.
dual_diagnosis.diagnosis: The Create Account button tap appears to have triggered a loading state but failed to complete the action, likely due to a backend API failure, network timeout, or frontend error preventing the sign-up flow from progressing.
